title: motebit.yaml (v1)
description: Declarative surface for a motebit: personality, provider, governance, MCP servers, and scheduled routines. Applied by `motebit up`.

version.description: Schema version. Currently `1`. Pinning lets future CLI versions print a targeted error on mismatch instead of silently misinterpreting the document.

name.description: Display name for this motebit. Surfaces in the REPL banner and delegation listings.

personality_notes.description: Free-form personality guidance. Appended to the system prompt on every turn. Keep short — every token here costs on every call.

temperature.description: Sampling temperature for the default provider [0, 2]. Unset = model default. Only applied when explicitly set.

max_tokens.description: Default max output tokens per response. Overridden by `--max-tokens` at the CLI.

mode.description: Provider mode. `byok` = bring-your-own API key (env var). `paid` = motebit cloud. `sovereign` = local on-device model (no external calls).

wireProtocol.description: Wire protocol the endpoint speaks. `anthropic` for Claude, `openai` for OpenAI-compatible endpoints (OpenAI, Ollama, LM Studio, vLLM).

baseUrl.description: Override the API base URL. Used for local inference servers (`http://localhost:11434/v1` for Ollama) or routing through a proxy.

maxTokens.description: Upper bound on response length (model output tokens).

provider.description: AI provider configuration. API keys are NEVER declared here — they're read from environment variables or the OS keyring.

approvalPreset.description: Default gate for tool calls. `cautious` = approve every sensitive call. `balanced` = approve writes, auto-approve reads. `autonomous` = auto-approve most calls.

persistenceThreshold.description: Memory-formation threshold [0, 1]. Higher = fewer memories formed; only strong signals persist. Typical: 0.6.

rejectSecrets.description: When true, the privacy layer blocks any tool call or outbound message whose content is classified as `secret`. Fail-closed: error on classifier failure.

maxCallsPerTurn.description: Per-turn tool-call ceiling. Bounds runaway loops and protects the policy gate from exhaustion attacks.

maxMemoriesPerTurn.description: Per-turn memory-formation ceiling. Prevents a single turn from flooding the memory graph.

governance.description: Governance at the boundary — surface-tension constraints that apply to every turn.

name.description: Local name for the MCP server. Must be unique.

transport.description: Transport. `stdio` spawns a child process; `http` connects to a URL.

command.description: Executable to spawn when `transport: stdio`. E.g. `npx`, `node`, `python`.

args.description: Argument vector passed to `command` when `transport: stdio`.

url.description: Endpoint URL when `transport: http`. Must be a full URL including scheme.

env.description: Environment variables set for the child process (stdio transport).

trusted.description: Auto-approve tool calls from this server. Equivalent to promoting the server into `mcp_trusted_servers`. Off by default.

motebit.description: This server is another motebit instance — enables motebit-to-motebit transport with caller identity injected into every call.

motebitType.description: Semantic role of the peer motebit. `personal` = another device of yours. `service` = paid worker. `collaborative` = peer agent.

items.description: MCP server — a tool source. stdio transports spawn a subprocess; http transports dial a remote endpoint.

mcp_servers.description: MCP tool servers to connect on start. Each entry declares transport, endpoint, and (optionally) trust status.

id.description: Stable identifier for the routine. Used as the upsert key — changing the id renames the routine (old one is pruned, new one added). Lowercase alphanumeric with `-` or `_`.

prompt.description: Natural-language prompt the agent runs on each tick. Content changes update the same goal row (preserving `created_at`).

every.description: Run cadence. Interval string (`<n>m`, `<n>h`, `<n>d`). E.g. `1h` = hourly.

mode.description: `recurring` runs every `every` tick forever. `once` runs a single time then marks the goal completed.

wall_clock.description: Hard wall-clock timeout per run. Kills the turn if it exceeds this. Default: 10m.

project.description: Project identifier — groups goals that share context (shared memory scope).

enabled.description: Set false to pause the routine without deleting it. Preserves state and history; resumable with no data loss.

items.description: A scheduled routine — compiles to exactly one Goal row. Changing fields other than `id` updates the same row in place.

routines.description: Scheduled routines. Each compiles to exactly one Goal row; `id` is the upsert key. Re-running `motebit up` on unchanged yaml is a true no-op.
